---
title: Slides
---

## Course Slides

Click on a topic to download the PDF slide deck.

| # | Module | |
|--:|--------|:-:|
| 1 | [Overview](slides/m1-ai-in-finance.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m1-ai-in-finance.pdf) |
| 2 | [Exploring Claude](slides/m2-intro-claude.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m2-intro-claude.pdf) |
| 3 | [Mean-Variance Analysis](slides/m3-mean-variance.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m3-mean-variance.pdf) |
| 4 | [Claude Desktop and Claude Code](slides/m4-claude.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m4-claude.pdf) |
| 5 | [Discounted Cash Flow Analysis](slides/m5-dcf.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m5-dcf.pdf) |
| 6 | [Claude Skills](slides/m6-skills.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m6-skills.pdf) |
| 7 | [Verification, Auditing, and Governance](slides/m7-reliability.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m7-reliability.pdf) |
| 8 | [More on AI Agents](slides/m8-agents.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m8-agents.pdf) |
| 9 | [Model Context Protocol](slides/m9-mcp.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m9-mcp.pdf) |
| 10 | [Retrieval Augmented Generation](slides/m10-rag.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m10-rag.pdf) |
| 11 | [Sentiment Analysis](slides/m11-sentiment.pdf) | [{{< fa file-pdf >}}](slides/m11-sentiment.pdf) |
